name: Nova Pro Earbuds
description: Premium wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life. Featuring custom-tuned drivers for immersive audio and IPX5 water resistance.

name: SoundCore Max Speaker
description: Portable Bluetooth speaker delivering 360° surround sound with powerful bass. Waterproof design perfect for outdoor adventures with 20-hour playtime.

name: StudioFi Over-Ear Headphones
description: Studio-grade over-ear headphones with hi-res audio certification and foldable design. The 40mm custom drivers deliver exceptional clarity across all frequencies.

name: Apex Series Watch
description: Advanced smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS tracking, and 7-day battery life. Supports 100+ workout modes with automatic detection and detailed analytics.

name: FitBand Pro X
description: Slim fitness band with continuous heart rate monitoring and sleep tracking. Features a vibrant AMOLED display with always-on capability and 14-day battery life.

name: UltraCase MagSafe Wallet
description: Premium leather phone wallet with MagSafe compatibility, holds up to 3 cards. Full-grain Italian leather with RFID blocking technology for secure card protection.

name: PowerVault 20K
description: 20,000mAh portable charger with 65W USB-C PD fast charging for laptops and phones. Compact design with LED power indicator and simultaneous charging for 3 devices.

name: NexPad Pro Laptop
description: Ultra-slim 14-inch laptop with 12th gen processor, 16GB RAM, and 512GB NVMe SSD. Features a 2.8K OLED display with 90Hz refresh rate and 12-hour battery life.

name: KeyMaster Mechanical Keyboard
description: Compact 75% mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches and per-key RGB lighting. Wireless Bluetooth 5.0 with 3-device multi-pairing and 4000mAh battery.

name: BassBox Mini Speaker
description: Compact Bluetooth speaker with surprisingly powerful bass output and 360° sound. Features built-in microphone for hands-free calls and 8-hour battery life.
